themes.label: Truth
themes.summary: This chapter brings truth, faithfulness, revelation, or the trustworthiness of God into focus. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "הָֽעֵדֻ֔ת: of testimony - testimony".
